features.description: Migration 010 seeds solicitud_material with 3-5 rows and 2-3 detail lines each
steps: Run: docker-compose exec backend bash scripts/db.sh migrate
Verify migration 010 applied: docker-compose exec backend bash scripts/db.sh current
Connect to DB and run: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM logistica.solicitud_material

features.description: Migration 010 seeds requerimiento with 3-5 rows and 2-3 detail lines each
steps: Connect to DB and run: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM logistica.requerimiento
Connect to DB and run: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM logistica.cotizacion_logistica
Connect to DB and run: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM proveedores.seleccion_proveedor

features.description: Migration 010 seeds SST inspection and report data
Migration 010 seeds RRHH worker registry and history data
Migration 010 uses valid FK references from existing seed data
steps: Verify no FK constraint violations in docker-compose logs backend
Run: docker-compose exec backend bash scripts/db.sh fresh
Verify all migrations apply cleanly (no errors)
Verify row counts match expectations for all seeded tables
